MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges.

Ms. Alavi reported that the accounting is done, that there are issues with the personal property that the trust distributes to specific people and requested a 30 day continuance. The status on filing an accounting petition was continued to February 3, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that it will be filed prior to that date.
